text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I'm fine. I've just been working on cleat
maintenance for the past few days.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Both of my cleats are badly worn down. I can't
give my all in a race if I leave them in poor
condition.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'd rather not sleep at all than be unable to
scratch that itch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's so obsessed with competing that
she hasn't slept in days...
